purpose: Repository evidence bundle for local-first QVAC review

files.purpose: Machine, OS, CPU, RAM, and Node runtime snapshot captured during the evidence run.
Local QVAC bridge health snapshot showing strict mode, loaded MedPsy model, local RAG readiness, ASR readiness, and TTS readiness.
Transparency declaration for runtime remote API usage; runtime inference API list is empty.
Saved debrief report from the standard chest-pain demo run.
Structured QVAC runtime event log for model loads and inference calls.
Parsed summary of inference-events.jsonl with model loads, ASR/TTS/RAG/completion counts, durations, token estimates, and notes.
Terminal capture from the strict local QVAC demo run, including model load, ASR/TTS readiness, topic extraction calls, and shutdown cleanup.
Index of the compact repository evidence set and remaining external submission artifacts.

externalArtifactsStillRequired: Demo video, ideally under 3 minutes and never over 5 minutes.
Hardware proof screenshot or short screen recording from macOS System Settings/System Report.
Public repository URL and final submission metadata.
notes: The .artifacts/submission directory is generated and ignored; the root .artifacts files are the compact repo evidence set.
Model artifact downloads are disclosed in remote-api-calls.json as acquisition-time downloads, not runtime inference APIs.
Completion TTFT is captured for streamed QVAC completion calls. Non-completion operations such as ASR, TTS, and RAG may leave ttftMs null while still recording durationMs.
